channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Woke AI Giants Combine Forces: Anthropic Commits $200 Billion to Google Cloud Services
item.description: Anthropic, the AI giant President Donald Trump has described as "leftwing nut jobs" has agreed to spend $200 billion with leftist giant Google over the next five years for cloud computing services. The post Woke AI Giants Combine Forces: Anthropic Commits $20… [Anthropic, Alphabet]
